programme.title: Grown Ups 2
programme.desc: Lenny Feder moves his family back to his hometown to be with his old friends and finds out that he didnt leave the crazy life behind in Los Angeles. Starring Adam Sandler, Kevin James, Chris Rock.

programme.title: Monsieur Lazhar
programme.desc: A recent emigrant (Fellag) of Algeria takes over a Canadian classroom after a teachers tragic death. Starring Mohamed Fellag, Sophie Nelisse, Émilien Neron.

programme.title: Before My Heart Falls
programme.desc: A teenager has a key moment in her life before she commits an act she will always regret. Starring Clemence Dufresne-Deslières, Étienne Laforge, Sophie Lorain.

programme.title: Hightown
programme.desc: Its Thanksgiving, but the drugs and despair dont let up: Frankie, riding an ocean of anxiety, takes Renee to the point of no return, Ray is going all in on a case no one wants him on and Alans dinner is interrupted.

programme.title: Hightown
programme.desc: Ray is so close to getting everything he wants, but he has to maneuver things just right; Jackie comes to a crossroad and must choose how to move forward.

programme.title: Being Julia
programme.desc: In 1938 London a theatrical actress (Annette Bening) devises an elaborate scheme against the social climber who used her. Starring Annette Bening, Jeremy Irons, Bruce Greenwood.

programme.title: The Nest
programme.desc: An entrepreneur and his family begin to unravel after moving into an old country manor in England in the 1980s. Starring Jude Law, Carrie Coon, Oona Roche.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr. Helen Magnus recruits a forensic psychiatrist to join her in a quest to track, study and protect the creatures that secretly populate the world.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr. Helen Magnus recruits a forensic psychiatrist to join her in a quest to track, study and protect the creatures that secretly populate the world.

programme.title: Santa Claus: The Movie
programme.desc: Santa (David Huddleston) and an elf (Dudley Moore) foil a New York toy manufacturers (John Lithgow) scheme to get rich off Christmas. Starring Dudley Moore, David Huddleston, John Lithgow.

programme.title: Spy Kids
programme.desc: When a technical genius kidnaps retired spies (Antonio Banderas, Carla Gugino), only their children can save them. Starring Antonio Banderas, Carla Gugino, Alexa PenaVega.

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: The Island of Lost Dreams
programme.desc: A young sister (Alexa Vega) and brother encounter mutants and a wild scientist while searching for a device that could destroy Earth. Starring Antonio Banderas, Carla Gugino, Alexa PenaVega.

programme.title: Reagan
programme.desc: From the glitter of Hollywood to the world stage, Ronald Reagan overcomes the odds to become the 40th president of the United States. Starring Dennis Quaid, Penelope Ann Miller, Jon Voight.

programme.title: Gem and Shaz
programme.desc: Two Asian Canadian teenage girls are given one hour at the school dance by their strict immigrant parents and are determined to make the most of it. Starring Jasmine Parmar, Cecilia Lee, Maryam Khalid.

programme.title: Perfect High
programme.desc: A teens (Bella Thorne) life spirals out of control when she starts abusing painkillers and heroin with her new friends (Israel Broussard, Daniela Bobadilla) from school. Starring Bella Thorne, Israel Broussard, Daniela Bobadilla.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Louisa May Alcotts classic story of the lives, loves and triumphs of four sisters in Civil War-era New England. Starring Winona Ryder, Gabriel Byrne, Trini Alvarado.

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: The beloved Crawleys and their intrepid staff prepare for the most important moment of their lives. A royal visit from the king and queen of England soon unleashes scandal, romance and intrigue -- leaving the future of Downton hanging in the balance. Starring Hugh Bonneville, Jim Carter, Michelle Dockery.

programme.title: Outlander: Blood of my Blood
programme.desc: All the Highland clans attend the Earl of Mars annual hunting event at Braemar Castle, where the Earl makes an inflammatory proclamation.

programme.title: The Other Boleyn Girl
programme.desc: Family ambition pits British sisters Anne (Natalie Portman) and Mary (Scarlett Johansson) Boleyn against each other for the affections of King Henry VIII. Starring Natalie Portman, Scarlett Johansson, Eric Bana.

programme.title: Mommy
programme.desc: A peculiar neighbor (Suzanne Clement) offers hope to a recent widow (Anne Dorval) who is struggling to raise a teenager (Antoine-Olivier Pilon) who is unpredictable and, sometimes, violent. Starring Anne Dorval, Antoine Olivier Pilon, Suzanne Clement.

programme.title: My Spy
programme.desc: Nine-year-old Sophie catches JJ, a hardened CIA operative, spying on her family during a routine surveillance operation. In exchange for not blowing his cover, JJ begrudgingly agrees to show the precocious girl how to be a spy. Starring Dave Bautista, Kristen Schaal, Parisa Fitz-Henley.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: A veteran con man is thrown off his game when his former lover and protege unexpectedly appears and interferes with his latest -- and very dangerous -- scheme. Starring Will Smith, Margot Robbie, Adrian Martinez.

programme.title: Breakaway
programme.desc: A young man is torn between his traditional Indo-Canadian family expectations and his dreams of playing hockey. Starring Russell Peters, Rob Lowe, Camilla Belle.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: In order to save his home, an ogre along with a donkey makes a deal with a mean lord to rescue a beautiful princess. Starring Mike Myers, Eddie Murphy, Cameron Diaz.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: After returning from their honeymoon and showing home movies to their friends, Shrek and Fiona learn that her parents have heard that she has married her true love and wish to invite him to their kingdom, called Far Far Away. Starring Mike Myers, Eddie Murphy, Cameron Diaz.

programme.title: Shrek the Third
programme.desc: When the King falls ill, Shrek finds and trains an heir apparent while Princess Fiona fends off Prince Charmings advances. Starring Mike Myers, Eddie Murphy, Cameron Diaz.

programme.title: Matilda
programme.desc: A little girl develops extraordinary mental abilities, despite neglectful parents and a brutal headmistress. Starring Mara Wilson, Danny DeVito, Rhea Perlman.

programme.title: Superman Returns
programme.desc: While Lex Luthor plots against him, the Man of Steel tries to reconnect with Lois Lane and find his place in a world that learned to survive in his absence. Starring Brandon Routh, Kate Bosworth, James Marsden.

programme.title: Catwoman
programme.desc: Patience Philips works as a graphic designer for Hedare Beauty, a cosmetics company on the verge of releasing an anti-aging product. When she inadvertently happens upon a secret her employer is hiding, she finds herself in the middle of a conspiracy. Starring Halle Berry, Benjamin Bratt, Sharon Stone.

programme.title: Wonder Woman
programme.desc: After leaving her island for the first time, Wonder Woman discovers her full powers and true destiny while fighting alongside men in a war to end all wars. Starring Gal Gadot, Chris Pine, Connie Nielsen.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 4
programme.desc: With the price on his head ever-increasing, legendary hit man John Wick takes his fight against the High Table global as he seeks out the most powerful players in the underworld, from New York to Paris to Japan to Berlin. Starring Keanu Reeves, Laurence Fishburne, Lance Reddick.

programme.title: Wick Is Pain
programme.desc: Join Keanu Reeves, director Chad Stahelski, and the extended "Wick" cast and crew as they go behind the scenes of a billion-dollar franchise that almost never happened. Starring Keanu Reeves, Chad Stahelski.

programme.title: Couples Retreat
programme.desc: Four couples find that paradise comes at a price when they must participate in therapy sessions at a tropical resort. Starring Vince Vaughn, Jason Bateman, Jon Favreau.

programme.title: The Grand Seduction
programme.desc: Residents of a small fishing community in Newfoundland charm a doctor into becoming the towns full-time physician in order to secure a vital factory contract. Starring Brendan Gleeson, Taylor Kitsch, Liane Balaban.

programme.title: One Day in the Life of Noah Piugattuk
programme.desc: A government agent tries to get an Inuit man and his children to move to settlement housing. Starring Kim Bodnia, Apayata Kotierk, Benjamin Kunuk.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: When Captain James Hook kidnaps his children, an adult Peter Pan must return to Neverland and reclaim his youthful spirit in order to challenge his old enemy. Starring Dustin Hoffman, Robin Williams, Julia Roberts.

programme.title: Dumb and Dumber
programme.desc: An inept dog groomer (Jeff Daniels) and a limousine driver (Jim Carrey) chase the latters dream girl (Lauren Holly) cross-country. Starring Jim Carrey, Jeff Daniels, Lauren Holly.

programme.title: Yes Man
programme.desc: After attending a self-help seminar, a negative-thinking man brings about a change in his life by saying yes to everything. Starring Jim Carrey, Zooey Deschanel, Bradley Cooper.

programme.title: Austin Powers: International Man of Mystery
programme.desc: In the 90s, a hip British agent must face his nemesis, who was cryogenically preserved since the 60s. Starring Mike Myers, Elizabeth Hurley, Michael York.

programme.title: Austin Powers: The Spy Who Shagged Me
programme.desc: The secret agent (Mike Myers) travels back in time to the 1960s to rescue his stolen mojo from Dr. Evil. Starring Mike Myers, Heather Graham, Michael York.

programme.title: Austin Powers in Goldmember
programme.desc: Austin must rescue his captive father and prevent Dr. Evils malevolent minions from taking over the world. Starring Mike Myers, Beyonce, Seth Green.

programme.title: The Devil Wears Prada
programme.desc: A recent college graduate lands a job working for a famous and diabolical editor of a New York fashion magazine. Starring Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Adrian Grenier.

programme.title: Outlander: Blood of my Blood
programme.desc: All the Highland clans attend the Earl of Mars annual hunting event at Braemar Castle, where the Earl makes an inflammatory proclamation.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: An ex-secret service agent falls for his client, an actress and singer someone wants dead before the Academy Awards. Starring Kevin Costner, Whitney Houston, Gary Kemp.

programme.title: The Death and Life of John F. Donovan
programme.desc: A young actor reminisces about a dead American TV star and the correspondence they shared. Starring Kit Harington, Natalie Portman, Jacob Tremblay.

programme.title: Good Time
programme.desc: A bank robber stops at nothing to free his brother from prison, launching himself into a nightlong odyssey through New Yorks dark and dangerous criminal underworld. Starring Robert Pattinson, Jennifer Jason Leigh, Barkhad Abdi.

programme.title: Strange Cargo
programme.desc: An island convict (Clark Gable), his girlfriend (Joan Crawford) and other lost souls escape in a sailboat with a Christlike man (Ian Hunter). Starring Joan Crawford, Clark Gable, Ian Hunter.

programme.title: Places in the Heart
programme.desc: A widowed mother fights for her cotton farm with a laborer and a blind boarder in the 1930s Texas. Starring Sally Field, Lindsay Crouse, John Malkovich.

programme.title: Tender Mercies
programme.desc: A divorced country singer (Robert Duvall) stops drinking and starts over with a loving widow (Tess Harper). Starring Robert Duvall, Tess Harper, Betty Buckley.

programme.title: A Well Spent Life
programme.desc: A tribute to the Texas musical performer Mance Lipscomb. Starring Mance Lipscomb, Elnora Lipscomb.

programme.title: Written on the Wind
programme.desc: A Texas oilmans (Robert Stack) sister makes him doubt his wife (Lauren Bacall) and best friend (Rock Hudson). Starring Rock Hudson, Lauren Bacall, Robert Stack.

programme.title: Blossoms in the Dust
programme.desc: The story of Edna Gladney (Greer Garson), founder of the Texas Childrens Home and Aid Society of Fort Worth. Starring Greer Garson, Walter Pidgeon, Felix Bressart.

programme.title: Boom Town
programme.desc: Texas wildcatters (Clark Gable, Spencer Tracy) hit oil together, then fight after one marries the others sweetheart (Claudette Colbert). Starring Clark Gable, Spencer Tracy, Claudette Colbert.

programme.title: A Damsel in Distress
programme.desc: Songs by George and Ira Gershwin highlight this tale of a dancer and the British heiress he mistakes for a chorus girl. Starring Fred Astaire, George Burns, Joan Fontaine.

programme.title: The Canterville Ghost
programme.desc: A GI (Robert Young) billets in a relatives (Margaret OBrien) castle, haunted by a cowardly 300-year-old ghost (Charles Laughton). Starring Charles Laughton, Robert Young, Margaret OBrien.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast
programme.desc: To save her father, a Frenchwoman (Josette Day) offers her life to a man (Jean Marais) under a bestial enchantment but who is noble and grows to love her. Starring Jean Marais, Josette Day, Mila Parely.

programme.title: Quentin Durward
programme.desc: Sir Walter Scotts Scottish Guard hero (Robert Taylor) foils Louis XI (Robert Morley) and wins Countess Isabelle (Kay Kendall) in 15th-century France. Starring Robert Taylor, Kay Kendall, Robert Morley.

programme.title: Knights of the Round Table
programme.desc: Sir Gawain meets the Green Knight, Sir Percival seeks the Holy Grail, and King Arthurs (Mel Ferrer) Guinevere (Ava Gardner) loves Sir Lancelot (Robert Taylor). Starring Robert Taylor, Ava Gardner, Mel Ferrer.

programme.title: The Prisoner of Zenda
programme.desc: Court followers foil a plot by having a British look-alike (Ronald Colman) pose as the king of Ruritania. Starring Ronald Colman, Madeleine Carroll, Douglas Fairbanks.

programme.title: The Private Lives of Elizabeth and Essex
programme.desc: Matronly Elizabeth I (Bette Davis) loves the dashing Earl of Essex (Errol Flynn), but politics come first. Starring Bette Davis, Errol Flynn, Olivia de Havilland.

programme.title: Boxcar Bertha
programme.desc: A young woman (Barbara Hershey) robs trains with a union man (David Carradine), a gambler (Barry Primus) and a friend in the Depression. Starring Barbara Hershey, David Carradine, Barry Primus.

programme.title: Rock n Roll High School
programme.desc: A teenager (P.J. Soles) and her friends get even with their principal to music by the Ramones. Starring P.J. Soles, Vince Van Patten, Clint Howard.

programme.title: The Shooting
programme.desc: A woman (Millie Perkins), two bounty hunters and a gunman (Jack Nicholson) ride into a desert and run out of water. Starring Millie Perkins, Jack Nicholson, Will Hutchins.

programme.title: Roger Corman: The Pope of Pop Cinema
programme.desc: "Roger Corman" is a by the numbers look at one of the most influential names in Hollywood; though many know him for his low budget exploitation movies, Roger Corman is also responsible for giving many names their start in the business.

programme.title: Stakeout on Dope Street
programme.desc: Three adolescents think their prayers have been answered when they stumble upon heroin abandoned by drug dealers. Starring Yale Wexler, Morris Miller, Abby Dalton.

programme.title: Made in England: The Films of Powell and Pressburger
programme.desc: Martin Scorsese reflects on the influence of filmmakers Michael Powell and Emeric Pressburger, whose decades-long collaboration led to a series of classics that made the duo a crucial part of British cinema.

programme.title: Bachelor Mother
programme.desc: An unmarried store clerk (Ginger Rogers) finds a baby on a doorstep and is quickly mistaken for its mother. Starring Ginger Rogers, David Niven, Charles Coburn.

programme.title: I Love You Again
programme.desc: A businessman (William Powell) snaps out of 9-year amnesia, reverts to con man and falls in love with his wife (Myrna Loy). Starring William Powell, Myrna Loy, Frank McHugh.

programme.title: Tarzans Greatest Adventure
programme.desc: A strange woman (Sara Shane) helps the ape man (Gordon Scott) stop a diamond hunter (Anthony Quayle) and his river gang. Starring Gordon Scott, Anthony Quayle, Sara Shane.

programme.title: Easy Life
programme.desc: A teenager (Bernard Thomas) becomes a hardened criminal. Starring Steven Geray, Bernard Thomas.

programme.title: It Happened in Brooklyn
programme.desc: A returned GI (Frank Sinatra), a British nobleman (Peter Lawford), a school janitor and a teacher (Kathryn Grayson) make music together. Starring Frank Sinatra, Kathryn Grayson, Peter Lawford.

programme.title: Berlin Express

programme.title: The Bad Seed

programme.title: Moonstruck
programme.desc: An Italian-American widow (Cher), engaged to a reticent suitor, falls in love with his brother (Nicolas Cage). Starring Cher, Nicolas Cage, Vincent Gardenia.

programme.title: Romeo and Juliet
programme.desc: Shakespeares Renaissance lovers (Norma Shearer, Leslie Howard) tragically defy their feuding parents. Starring Norma Shearer, Leslie Howard, John Barrymore.

programme.title: Murder, He Says
programme.desc: A pollster (Fred MacMurray) and a bank tellers daughter (Helen Walker) ask a mountain clan too many questions. Starring Fred MacMurray, Helen Walker, Marjorie Main.

programme.title: 711 Ocean Drive
programme.desc: A telephone repairman (Edmond OBrien) becomes the boss of a gambling syndicate he has ingeniously wired for profit. Starring Edmond OBrien, Joanne Dru, Otto Kruger.

programme.title: I Confess
programme.desc: A priest honors the sanctity of the confessional when he stands trial for a murder committed by one of his penitents. Starring Montgomery Clift, Anne Baxter, Karl Malden.

programme.title: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: A New York nightclub musician (Henry Fonda) and his wife (Vera Miles) endure an ordeal of mistaken identity. Starring Henry Fonda, Vera Miles, Anthony Quayle.

programme.title: The Big Shot
programme.desc: An ex-convict (Humphrey Bogart) lands back in prison, then escapes and flees with his ex-girlfriend (Irene Manning), a lawyers wife. Starring Humphrey Bogart, Irene Manning, Richard Travis.

programme.desc: A telephone repairman (Edmond OBrien) becomes the boss of a gambling syndicate he has ingeniously wired for profit. Starring Edmond OBrien, Joanne Dru, Otto Kruger.

programme.desc: A music professor (Ryan ONeal) visits San Francisco with his fiancee (Madeline Kahn) and meets a kooky woman (Barbra Streisand). Starring Barbra Streisand, Ryan ONeal, Madeline Kahn.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: Yingying Zhang, a scholar with a bright future, goes missing after entering a mysterious car; what investigators uncover stuns her community and points to an unimaginable crime.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: James Lally admits that he has killed his partner Suzanne LaPierre; it takes more than confession for police to locate her body, leading authorities to a long interrogation with a character who seems more concerned with his own comfort.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: A messy divorce leads to a woman hiding a large sum of money with one of her close friends; when the woman goes missing, her friend, Ashley, is believed to be involved in more than just attempted fraud.

programme.title: Eve of Abduction
programme.desc: When a single mother becomes engaged, she receives an anonymous threat -- either break off the engagement or her daughter will be kidnapped. Starring Sarah Lind, Robb Derringer, Braeden Carl.

programme.title: The Girl Who Escaped: The Kara Robinson Story
programme.desc: Kidnapped, assaulted and held captive for 18 hours, 15-year-old Kara Robinson plots a daring escape from a serial killers apartment. Starring Katie Douglas, Cara Buono, Kristian Bruun.

programme.title: The Girl Locked Upstairs: The Tanya Kach Story
programme.desc: Feeling isolated and lonely, 14-year-old Tanya Kach befriends Tom Hose, a school security guard who lures her to his home. Held captive and abused for 10 years, Tanya eventually finds the courage to take a dangerous step toward freedom. Starring Robert Baker, Jordyn Ashley Olson.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: James Lally admits that he has killed his partner Suzanne LaPierre; it takes more than confession for police to locate her body, leading authorities to a long interrogation with a character who seems more concerned with his own comfort.

programme.title: One Way Mirror
programme.desc: A messy divorce leads to a woman hiding a large sum of money with one of her close friends; when the woman goes missing, her friend, Ashley, is believed to be involved in more than just attempted fraud.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: Sierah Joughin, a 20-year-old college student, vanishes while biking home in rural Ohio; days later, her body is found, sparking an investigation; evidence uncovers a dark connection to a past crime.

programme.title: Eve of Abduction
programme.desc: When a single mother becomes engaged, she receives an anonymous threat -- either break off the engagement or her daughter will be kidnapped. Starring Sarah Lind, Robb Derringer, Braeden Carl.

programme.title: The Girl Who Escaped: The Kara Robinson Story
programme.desc: Kidnapped, assaulted and held captive for 18 hours, 15-year-old Kara Robinson plots a daring escape from a serial killers apartment. Starring Katie Douglas, Cara Buono, Kristian Bruun.

programme.title: The Girl Locked Upstairs: The Tanya Kach Story
programme.desc: Feeling isolated and lonely, 14-year-old Tanya Kach befriends Tom Hose, a school security guard who lures her to his home. Held captive and abused for 10 years, Tanya eventually finds the courage to take a dangerous step toward freedom. Starring Robert Baker, Jordyn Ashley Olson.

programme.title: Kidnapped to the Island
programme.desc: A shady singer lures a star-struck teen to a faraway island with promises of fame and fortune. But when it turns out to be a sex-trafficking ring, her desperate mother embarks on a daring crusade to save her. Starring Gina Holden, Mozart Dee, James William OHalloran.

programme.title: Little Girl in the Woods
programme.desc: While backpacking in the deep woods, members of a womens bereavement support group must band together to save a teenage girl whos being held captive in a cabin. Starring Alana Hawley Purvis, Camille Atebe, Caitlin Stryker.

programme.title: A Kidnapping in Amish Country
programme.desc: When an Amish woman realizes her daughter has been kidnapped, she turns to the only person who can help her -- her estranged best friend whos renounced the Amish way of life. Starring Jorja Cadence, Elise Bauman, Benjamin Sutherland.

programme.title: Little Girl in the Woods
programme.desc: While backpacking in the deep woods, members of a womens bereavement support group must band together to save a teenage girl whos being held captive in a cabin. Starring Alana Hawley Purvis, Camille Atebe, Caitlin Stryker.

programme.title: The Girl Who Escaped: The Kara Robinson Story
programme.desc: Kidnapped, assaulted and held captive for 18 hours, 15-year-old Kara Robinson plots a daring escape from a serial killers apartment. Starring Katie Douglas, Cara Buono, Kristian Bruun.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: In this case, Tiara Pool, a 21-year-old Navy wife from Jacksonville, Florida, meets David Sparre on Craigslist; their encounter takes a horrific turn when Sparre brutally stabs Tiara 89 times in her apartment in July 2010.

programme.title: Finally Caught
programme.desc: Heather Strubes life takes a tragic turn during a bitter custody battle with her ex-husband, Steven Strube; as she goes to a Target parking lot for a custody exchange of their son, Carson, she is brutally shot in front of Carson.

programme.title: An Hour to Kill
programme.desc: In a single hour, Catherine Hill discovers that her lodger has left the body of a local girl under his bed; in a series of victims across North America, from a man the newspapers dub The Gorilla Man.

programme.title: An Hour to Kill
programme.desc: Kurt Johnson is alone on New Years Eve when he decides to go to a local bar for a drink; there, he meets a young man also ringing in the new year solo; before the night is over, Johnson vanishes, and any trace of him is covered by a snowstorm.

programme.title: An Hour to Kill
programme.desc: In the wake of marriage troubles between Keith and Ronda Black, Ronda goes on a shopping trip with Keiths close friend, Howard Steadman; Howard must muster his courage during their time away from Keith to reveal the truth to Ronda.

programme.title: Raging Grace
programme.desc: Nothing is as it seems when an undocumented Filipina immigrant takes a job as a caretaker for a terminally ill man in a lavish home. She and her daughter soon become ensnared by a terrible secret that threatens to tear them apart. Starring Max Eigenmann, Jaeden Boadilla, Leanne Best.

programme.title: Exhibiting Forgiveness
programme.desc: A Black artist finds his path to success derailed by an unexpected visit from his estranged father, a recovering addict desperate to reconcile. Together, they learn that forgetting might be harder than forgiving. Starring Andre Holland, John Earl Jelks, Andra Day.

programme.title: Cheech and Chongs Last Movie (2024)

programme.desc: Paul Lisnek is a man of many talents: a lawyer, an award-winning television and radio host, a nationally recognized jury and trial consultant, an on-air political and legal analyst, an author, and a prolific collector. Paul was in fact featured on the premiere episode of Collectors Call, exhibiting his extensive collection of U.S. historical political items. He is making a return appearance on the shows seventh season, but this time, he is showcasing his enormous TV memorabilia collection.
